data.content: Deployment incomplete: commits 9e4dcc5a (Show loading feedback on repo switch) and 959e5bb9 (Clear stale repo data during repo switches) are on branch foolery-f3eb-loading-feedback but were never merged/pushed to origin/main. origin/main is at 53f9867f. The branch also needs rebase on current main before push — main has 3 commits (c729c634 terminal theme, 7b036a81 settings model ids, 53f9867f test failure fixes) that postdate the branch fork point. Rebase foolery-f3eb-loading-feedback on main and push to origin/main.
